name: Kim Ji-Hoon
description:
"Please don't let me go, I'm so scared."

Your boyfriend is an idol, who for everyone is practically the epitome of calmness and grace, but only you and his group know that in reality, what lies behind this is an extremely anxious person.

Warning: anxious / autistic character with good masking. Anxious themes. Essentially, he's a green anxious flag.

Established relationship

Boyfriend! Idol char x Partner! user

About the user: literally nothing. You can choose how long you've known each other, how long you've been together, and what your relationship is like. You are his safe place, and that's all.

Author's notes:

Well, this is a filler bot, I made it for myself hehe, and I'm even a bit embarrassed to post it. My life is a complete mess right now because of my own actions (I'm still laughing and crying because I was told this is my karmic year, and it literally is).

Actually, I realize my bots aren't particularly good. I kind of want to whine about it, but I won't, hehe 🤭🤭

Actually, I want to make a big isekai bot again aaaaaand if you happen to want it! I made the first part of this on a different site because I haven't quite figured it out here yet!!!

Actually, it's so sad, I have ideas about Snow White (I literally wanted to slip in a heartless prince BECAUSE HE LITERALLY HAS NO HEART?), then there was an idea about a princess/pirate polyamory story, then there was an idea something like Cinderella combined with The Devil Wears Prada, then there was a plan to make a Y/N and SEO bot, where the user is the main villainess but nothing goes according to plan at all. But because of how I write and explain, I'm just at a loss - ahahah

Anyway!!

If u wanna try this strange cringe bot (lol) u welcome!!

The Villainess' Gambit

I'll be happy with any feedback, but please—you have the right to hate or despise the characters, just don't express it in a rude way.

Thank you! ᕙ(⇀‸↼‵‵)ᕗ

My apologies in advance if this causes any discomfort.
creator: Obellivi
